name: mojo-val-accuracy-behavioral-test
description: Add a behavioral test asserting metrics.val_accuracy is updated after ValidationLoop.run() with compute_accuracy=True. Use when: (1) a GH issue flags that only the default value is tested but not the behavioral effect, (2) you need a deterministic accuracy assertion using all-zero logits and labels, (3) closing a test gap between init-defaults and run-effects tests.
